LIVE ▸
"By His stripes you were healed."— 1 Peter 2:24·"God so loved the world He gave His only Son."— John 3:16·"I am the Lord who heals you."— Exodus 15:26·"My word is medicine to all your flesh."— Proverbs 4:22·Triumphant Gospel airs Mon–Fri at 7 AM & 10 PM EST on Daystar & TBN·"The same Spirit that raised Jesus dwells in you."— Romans 8:11·Healing Is Here Conference — August 12–15 · Register Now·"Bless the Lord who heals all your diseases."— Psalm 103:3·"By His stripes you were healed."— 1 Peter 2:24·"God so loved the world He gave His only Son."— John 3:16·"I am the Lord who heals you."— Exodus 15:26·"My word is medicine to all your flesh."— Proverbs 4:22·Triumphant Gospel airs Mon–Fri at 7 AM & 10 PM EST on Daystar & TBN·"The same Spirit that raised Jesus dwells in you."— Romans 8:11·Healing Is Here Conference — August 12–15 · Register Now·"Bless the Lord who heals all your diseases."— Psalm 103:3·

Grace & Recovery

Triumphant Healing Center

"He sent his word, and healed them, and delivered them from their destructions." — Psalms 107:20

Healing Scriptures & Declarations

Isaiah 53:5general

"But he was wounded for our transgressions...and with his stripes we are healed."

Declare: "Jesus took my sicknesses. By His stripes, I was healed. Healing belongs to me right now."

Proverbs 4:20-22chronic

"My son, attend to my words...they are life unto those that find them, and health to all their flesh."

Declare: "God's word is medicine to my flesh. I meditate on it and it brings health and strength to every cell."

Romans 8:11terminal

"...he that raised up Christ from the dead shall also quicken your mortal bodies by his Spirit that dwelleth in you."

Declare: "The Spirit who raised Jesus lives in me. He is restoring and vitalizing my physical body right now."

2 Timothy 1:7mental

"For God hath not given us the spirit of fear; but of power, and of love, and of a sound mind."

Declare: "I refuse anxiety and fear. God has given me power, love, and a perfectly sound and peaceful mind."

Psalms 103:3general

"Who forgiveth all thine iniquities; who healeth all thy diseases;"

Declare: "Healing all my diseases is a direct benefit of my covenant with God. My body is strong and fully restored."

Submit a Prayer Request

Our prayer ministers stand in faith with you. Submit your details and we will agree with you for complete healing.

Verified Reports

Recovery Journeys

Lance's Liver Healing

terminal

Doctors gave Lance weeks to live due to critical liver failure. By standing on 1 Peter 2:24 and applying Andrew's teaching, his body was completely transformed.

Hannah's Eyesight Restored

chronic

Diagnosed with progressive macular degeneration, Hannah claimed God's promise for healing. At her next check-up, her retina was completely healthy and her vision fully restored.

Freedom from 15-Year Back Pain

chronic

Michael lived with debilitating lumbar stenosis for 15 years. During a Triumphant Healing conference, he commanded the pain to leave. It vanished immediately — he has been drug-free since.

Healed of Stage 4 Cancer

terminal

Given a terminal diagnosis, Margaret refused to accept it. She listened to healing scriptures daily. Her oncologist called her results "medically inexplicable." She is cancer-free today.

TMThe Triumphant Ministry

Teaching God's unconditional love and grace to the world — free of charge since 1978.
